mapper.select: INSERT INTO presence_video_clips ( clip_key, clip_type, session_id, scene_group_id, location_id, track_key, start_time, end_time, pre_roll_sec, post_roll_sec, video_url, status, provider_status, provider_task_id, provider_source_url, provider_error_message, public_video_url, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{clipKey}, #{clipType}, #{sessionId}, #{sceneGroupId}, #{locationId}, #{trackKey}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{preRollSec}, #{postRollSec}, #{videoUrl}, #{status}, #{providerStatus}, #{providerTaskId}, #{providerSourceUrl}, #{providerErrorMessage}, #{publicVideoUrl}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (clip_key) DO UPDATE SET session_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.session_id, presence_video_clips.session_id), scene_group_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.scene_group_id, presence_video_clips.scene_group_id), location_id = EXCLUDED.location_id, track_key = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.track_key, presence_video_clips.track_key), start_time = EXCLUDED.start_time, end_time = EXCLUDED.end_time, pre_roll_sec = EXCLUDED.pre_roll_sec, post_roll_sec = EXCLUDED.post_roll_sec, video_url = EXCLUDED.video_url, status = EXCLUDED.status, provider_status = EXCLUDED.provider_status, provider_task_id = EXCLUDED.provider_task_id, provider_source_url = EXCLUDED.provider_source_url, provider_error_message = EXCLUDED.provider_error_message, public_video_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.public_video_url, presence_video_clips.public_video_url), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE presence_video_clips SET video_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{videoUrl}, ''), video_url), status = #{status}, provider_status = #{providerStatus}, provider_task_id = #{providerTaskId}, provider_source_url = #{providerSourceUrl}, provider_error_message = #{providerErrorMessage}, public_video_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{publicVideoUrl}, ''), public_video_url), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE presence_video_clips SET public_video_url = #{publicVideoUrl}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, status), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, clip_key AS clipKey, clip_type AS clipType, session_id AS sessionId, scene_group_id AS sceneGroupId, location_id AS locationId, track_key AS trackKey, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, pre_roll_sec AS preRollSec, post_roll_sec AS postRollSec, video_url AS videoUrl, status, provider_status AS providerStatus, provider_task_id AS providerTaskId, provider_source_url AS providerSourceUrl, provider_error_message AS providerErrorMessage, public_video_url AS publicVideoUrl FROM presence_video_clips WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, clip_key AS clipKey, clip_type AS clipType, session_id AS sessionId, scene_group_id AS sceneGroupId, location_id AS locationId, track_key AS trackKey, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, pre_roll_sec AS preRollSec, post_roll_sec AS postRollSec, video_url AS videoUrl, status, provider_status AS providerStatus, provider_task_id AS providerTaskId, provider_source_url AS providerSourceUrl, provider_error_message AS providerErrorMessage, public_video_url AS publicVideoUrl FROM presence_video_clips WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, clip_key AS clipKey, clip_type AS clipType, session_id AS sessionId, scene_group_id AS sceneGroupId, location_id AS locationId, track_key AS trackKey, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, pre_roll_sec AS preRollSec, post_roll_sec AS postRollSec, video_url AS videoUrl, status, provider_status AS providerStatus, provider_task_id AS providerTaskId, provider_source_url AS providerSourceUrl, provider_error_message AS providerErrorMessage, public_video_url AS publicVideoUrl FROM presence_video_clips WHERE clip_type = 'scene_group' AND scene_group_id = #{sceneGroupId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis_results ( target_type, target_id, model_key, model_name, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{modelKey}, #{modelName}, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id, model_key) DO UPDATE SET model_name = EXCLUDED.model_name, status = 'pending', error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_analysis_results SET status = #{status}, summary = #{summary}, appearance = #{appearance}, behavior = #{behavior}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, raw_json = #{rawJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND model_key = #{modelKey}

UPDATE behavior_logs SET scene_group_id = #{sceneGroupId}, analysis_status = COALESCE(analysis_status, #{analysisStatus}) WHERE source = 'live' AND location_id = #{locationId} AND event_time >= (CAST(#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS timestamp) - INTERVAL '10 seconds') AND event_time <= (CAST(#{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS timestamp) + INTERVAL '10 seconds')
